should_trigger.prompt: The PrismSpec verification pipeline failed and the root cause is not clear.
This test is failing unexpectedly; reproduce and trace before fixing.
We tried two fixes and the same command still fails.
should_trigger.reason: Repeated failed fixes require root-cause investigation.

should_not_trigger.prompt: Root cause is proven; implement the one-line fix from plan.md.
Run final verification after the fix.
Write the initial spec and acceptance criteria.

assertions: Reproduces or documents inability to reproduce before fixing.
States one root-cause hypothesis with evidence.
Adds or identifies a failing test when behavior is testable.
